feature: Enhanced Article Selection in Purchase Orders (Órdenes de Compra)
summary: Complete testing of P0 feature: enriched article dropdown for OC. Backend API (GET /api/articulos-oc) returns all required fields. Frontend dropdown shows Name | Stock | Línea de Negocio and auto-populates fields on selection. All 17 backend tests passed (100%). All frontend UI tests passed.

Backend_articulos_oc_endpoint.details: Returns enriched article data with stock_actual, linea_negocio_nombre, ultimo_precio, unidad_medida. Excludes PT category articles.

Backend_search_filtering.details: Search works by nombre and codigo. Case insensitive. Returns correct filtered results.

Backend_ultimo_precio_logic.details: TEL001 has 15.0 from OC history (cont_oc_linea). BOT001 has 0.6 from inventory entries (prod_inventario_ingresos). TEL-002 has 0 (no history).

Frontend_dropdown_display.details: Dropdown shows articles with [codigo] nombre, stock (colored badge), linea_negocio_nombre, and ultimo_precio (S/X.XX format).

Frontend_auto_population.details: Selecting article auto-populates: unidad (metro/unidad), precio_unitario (from ultimo_precio), codigo, descripcion.

Frontend_search_by_linea_negocio.details: Search by 'element' returns articles from 'Pantalon denim - Element Premium' linea.

seed_data_creation: Using existing data: 4 non-PT articles (TEL001, TEL-002, BOT001, BOT002). TEL001 has OC price history (15.0), BOT001/BOT002 have inventory entry prices (0.6, 0.66), TEL-002 has no price history (0).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Articulos-OC feature fully functional. Backend: GET /api/articulos-oc returns enriched data with stock, linea_negocio, ultimo_precio. Frontend: OrdenesCompra.jsx dropdown shows Name | Stock | Línea de Negocio | Precio. Selection auto-populates unidad, precio_unitario, codigo, descripcion. Search works by nombre, codigo, and linea_negocio_nombre.
